title: The Case of the Hanging Checkout
description: Users are reporting that the checkout process hangs indefinitely after clicking 'Pay'.

docs.title: Checkout Flow
docs.content:
1. Validate Cart
2. Call Payment Gateway
3. Update Inventory

sql: CREATE TABLE payments (id SERIAL, status TEXT, amount INT);
